footer.bridgeText: Bridging international healthcare standards with local accessibility in Douala, Cameroon. {slogan}.

hospital.tagline: Care that heals, compassion that stays
hospital.founderBio: After a distinguished career as a Registered Nurse in the United States, Mr. Kehbuma returned to his roots with a clear mission: to close the gap between international healthcare standards and local accessibility.
hospital.locationLandmark: Cibec Entrance (Near Tradex), behind Mother Julia Primary School

specialized-care.title: Specialized Care
specialized-care.summary: Compassionate, expert-led care across women's health, maternity, and consultations — anchored in international protocols.
specialized-care.description: From the first prenatal visit to your child's first vaccine, our specialized-care team is built around continuity. Internationally trained physicians and nurses lead every step, supported by modern equipment and a quiet, dignified environment that puts patients at ease.
specialized-care.included1Body: Comprehensive women's health — routine exams, family planning, fertility consultations, and gynecological care.
specialized-care.included2Body: Antenatal visits, safe deliveries 24/7, and dedicated neonatal monitoring for newborns.
specialized-care.included3Body: Adult and pediatric consultations led by physicians trained to international standards.

surgical-expertise.title: Surgical Expertise
surgical-expertise.summary: Modern operating theatres and experienced surgeons for procedures from elective to aesthetic — with patient comfort first.
surgical-expertise.description: Our surgical suites are built for precision and safety. Pre-operative planning, sterile technique, and post-operative recovery are coordinated by a single team — so you only ever have one care plan to follow.
surgical-expertise.included1Body: Elective and emergency procedures performed in a modern operating theatre with experienced surgeons.
surgical-expertise.included2Body: Aesthetic procedures led by certified surgeons, with private consultations and discreet aftercare.
surgical-expertise.included3Body: Personalized recovery plans, in-house nursing, and follow-up so healing stays on track.

diagnostic-support.title: Diagnostic & Support Services
diagnostic-support.summary: Accurate diagnostics, fast results, and continuous nursing care — every supporting service runs to the same clinical standard.
diagnostic-support.description: Diagnostics shouldn't feel like an extra trip. Our on-site laboratory, pharmacy, and imaging are coordinated with the clinical team so you can move from consultation to result to treatment without leaving the building.
diagnostic-support.included1Body: On-site lab with same-day results and a fully stocked pharmacy under one roof.
diagnostic-support.included2Body: Digital imaging interpreted by trained radiology staff, including obstetric ultrasound.
diagnostic-support.included3Body: Comfortable inpatient wards with attentive nursing care available 24/7.

community-health.title: Community Health
community-health.summary: Preventive care that meets the Bonasama community where it lives — dental services, vaccinations, and health education.
community-health.description: Healthy communities are built one habit at a time. Our community-health programs bring preventive services to families across the Bonasama Health District through dental clinics, vaccination drives, and on-the-ground education.
community-health.included1Body: Routine cleanings, restorative dentistry, and preventive care for the whole family.
community-health.included2Body: Immunization schedules and seasonal vaccination drives for children and adults.
community-health.included3Body: Community workshops on nutrition, malaria prevention, and rainy-season safety.

facilities.title: State-of-the-art facilities
facilities.body: Modern wards and equipment designed for comfort and precision.

global.title: Local roots, global standards
global.body: A blend of local dedication and international experience.

patientFirst.title: Patient-first, every touchpoint
patientFirst.body: We prioritize patient satisfaction and well-being from arrival to follow-up.

bonasama.title: In the heart of Bonasama
bonasama.body: Located in the Bonasama Health District for easy access.

home.metaTitle: Unique Hospital — Service of the Heart
home.metaDescription: Redefining Healthcare Excellence in Cameroon. 24/7 OBGYN, Surgery, Laboratory, Pharmacy, and Community Health — US-standard customer service in Bonaberi-Douala.
home.ogTitle: Unique Hospital — Service of the Heart
home.ogDescription: International healthcare standards meet local accessibility in Bonaberi-Douala, Cameroon.
home.heroSubtitle: {tagline}. We blend modern American healthcare insights with a deep love for the Cameroonian community — a new standard for medical delivery, where quality, innovation, and patient dignity come first.
home.servicesTitlePre: Care that meets you where you live —
home.philosophyTitle: Healthcare as a service of the heart.
home.philosophyBody: We blend clinical excellence with profound compassion, ensuring that every patient's needs are the primary architect of their care. True healing happens when medicine meets humanity — our team operates as a single, synchronized force combining expertise, safety, and dedication to guide you on the swiftest path to recovery.
home.philosophyPillar1Body: Patient needs are the primary architect of their care.
home.philosophyPillar2Body: One team, one force — expertise, safety, dedication.
home.philosophyPillar3Body: Medicine that meets humanity, guiding you home faster.
home.pillarsEyebrow: Why entrust your health to us
home.familyBody: Our customer-service model — brought from the U.S. by our founder — runs through every shift: 24/7 care, friendly nursing staff, and a clean, respectful environment that treats every patient with the dignity they deserve.
home.ctaSubtitle: Walk in at {landmark} — or reserve your slot online and skip the queue.

about.metaDescription: Established August 8, 2022 by Franklin Kehbuma (RN, BSN), Unique Hospital brings US-trained healthcare standards to Bonaberi-Douala, Cameroon.
about.subtitle: {tagline}.
about.historyBodyPre: Unique Hospital is the realization of a vision by
about.historyBody2: Unique Hospital isn't just a medical facility; it is a promise of hope. By integrating modern American healthcare insights with a deep love for the Cameroonian community, we are setting a new standard for medical delivery — one where quality, innovation, and patient dignity come first.
about.missionQuote: Our mission is to transform healthcare into a service of the heart. We believe that true healing happens when medicine meets humanity.
about.value1Body: Every patient's needs are the primary architect of their care.
about.value2Body: Care guided by US-trained insights and modern protocols.
about.value3Body: Training the next generation of caregivers, on-site.
about.value4Body: 24/7 care in the heart of the Bonasama Health District.
about.instituteBody: At our Paramedical Institute, we don't just treat patients; we train the next generation of healthcare heroes. Our students benefit from hands-on clinical experience right here within the Unique Hospital ecosystem.

servicesPage.metaDescription: OBGYN, Surgery, Laboratory & Pharmacy, and Community Health at Unique Hospital, Bonaberi-Douala.
servicesPage.subtitle: From maternity to surgery, diagnostics to community outreach — every service runs on the same standard of care.

blogPage.metaDescription: Health tips, hospital updates, and stories from the Bonasama community.
blogPage.subtitle: Practical health tips, hospital updates, and behind-the-scenes looks at how we deliver care.
blogPage.emptyState: No posts yet. Check back soon.

contactPage.metaDescription: Visit us in Bonaberi-Douala or call (+237) 652 775 214. Open 24/7.
contactPage.formSubtitle: Have a question, feedback, or want to schedule something specific? Write to us — we read every message and reply within 24 hours.

contactForm.subject: Subject
contactForm.messagePlaceholder: Share a few details so we can route your message to the right team.
contactForm.errorMessage: Please write at least a few words
contactForm.errorGeneric: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again or call us directly.
contactForm.errorNetwork: We couldn't reach our servers. Check your connection and try again.
contactForm.successBody: Thanks for reaching out — our team will get back to you shortly.

appointmentPage.metaDescription: Reserve your slot at Unique Hospital — OBGYN, Surgery, Lab/Pharmacy, or Community Health.
appointmentPage.subtitle: Tell us about you, choose a service and time, and we'll confirm by phone within the hour. For emergencies, walk in or call us 24/7.

booking.errorGeneric: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again or call us directly.
booking.errorNetwork: We couldn't reach our servers. Check your connection and try again.
booking.successBody: Thanks — we've received your details and our team will reach out shortly to confirm. For urgent care, call us 24/7.
